items.hook: The Odyssey film fans inspired to go back to the source
items.body: Book sales and audiobook figures for Homer's original poem rise sharply after the film's release.

items.hook: Point of Contact is a techno-thriller novel, written by Mike Maden and released on June 13, 2017.
items.body: It is his first book in the Jack Ryan Jr. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: The Hollows is a series of urban fantasy novels by Kim Harrison, originally published by HarperCollins Publishers and by Ace Books since 2020.
items.body: The series includes 18 novels, numerous novellas and short stories, two graphic novels, and one compendium resource; a 19th novel, Absolute Demon, is forthcoming in 2027. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Watch the total solar eclipse with ESA in León
items.body: Discover the science behind one of nature's most extraordinary phenomena and experience a total solar eclipse with the European Space Agency (ESA), the City of León and the University of León.

items.hook: BFI reveals next director of Filmmaking Funds
items.body: New director will take over from Mia Bays in October.

items.hook: Former River City actor Iain Robertson jailed for nine years for rape
items.body: The 45-year-old, played Stevie O'Hara in the BBC soap, was convicted of five offences against the women between 2004 and 2019.

items.hook: The Net is a 1975 West German drama film directed by Manfred Purzer and starring Mel Ferrer.
items.body: It is based on the novel The Poisoned Stream by Hans Habe. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Seinfeld actor apologises to reality star for 'inappropriate' sketch when she was 17
items.body: Jason Alexander said he "truly regrets" the Funny Or Die sketch he appeared in with Courtney Stodden.

items.hook: Kalpatta Narayanan is an Indian novelist, short story writer, essayist, columnist, and a poet of Malayalam literature.
items.body: He is known for his novel, Ithramathram and a number of poetry anthologies and other literary contributions. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Decoding Charli XCX's new album, Music, Fashion, Film
items.body: The star's new album strips away artifice to examine her life after the phenomenal success of Brat.

items.hook: haliana is the only arboreal skink in Sri Lanka.
items.body: The Haly's tree skink is a species of lizard in the family Scincidae. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.opener: Here's one for the group chat —
items.hook: Queen Millennia is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Leiji Matsumoto which was serialized from 28 January 1980 through 11 May 1983 in both the Sankei Shimbun and Nishinippon Sports newspapers.
items.body: The manga series was adapted into a 42-episode anime television series by Toei Animation and broadcast on Fuji Television and its affiliates from 16 April 1981 through 25 March 1982. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Invite review – A-list ensemble electrify hilarious couples night gone wrong comedy
items.body:
Sundance film festival: Olivia Wilde, Seth Rogen, Penelope Cruz and Edward Norton are exceptional in a smart and funny winner about sex, marriage and partner-swapping
